car_details.description: This Toyota Camry XLE comes with a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine producing 203 horsepower. It has an 8-speed automatic transmission and a front-wheel-drive (FWD) drivetrain. The car runs on regular gasoline and has an estimated fuel economy of 28 MPG city / 39 MPG highway. Interior features include leather seats, a sunroof, dual-zone climate control, and a premium JBL audio system.
